MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF JEROME JACKSON.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion for withdrawal of attorney of record is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order on the mandatory judicial council form (MC-053).

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Off Calendar Aug-04-2025 Off Calendar

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. Movant filed a superseding motion.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Continued To Aug-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. Franklin Obi, Esq. of KRA Legal P.C. (tel: 310-431-9875) for Plaintiff Jerome Jackson.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF JEROME JACKSON.

Matter discussed as to the lack of proof of service. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court continues the matter to August 4, 2025, at 9:00 A.M. in department 301. Counsel is to give notice to the Plaintiff and submit it for filing along with a proof of service.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
